title: Markdown document viewer with mermaid diagram support
purpose: Renders markdown content with syntax highlighting and mermaid diagram support in a scrollable container. Handles loading states and empty content displays.
module_context: Exports a DocumentViewer component that renders markdown content with custom handling for code blocks, headers, lists, and inline formatting. Includes a MermaidBlock subcomponent for rendering mermaid diagrams and a set of helper functions for markdown processing.

steps.content: Initialize a unique identifier for the mermaid diagram.
Set up a ref to hold the container element for the diagram.
Initialize state to track rendering errors.
Configure mermaid library on first render if not already initialized.
Render the mermaid diagram when content changes or component mounts.
Handle rendering errors by displaying error message in UI.
Return a container div that displays the rendered diagram or error message.
Split the markdown content into individual lines for processing.
Initialize tracking variables for code block state and content.
Process each line to identify and render code blocks, headers, lists, and paragraphs.
For code blocks, determine if they are mermaid diagrams and render with MermaidBlock component.
For regular code blocks, render with appropriate styling and language indicator.
For headers, render with appropriate heading tags and styling.
For list items, render with appropriate list styling.
For regular paragraphs, render with appropriate paragraph styling.
Initialize tracking variables for processing inline markdown elements.
Process text to identify and render inline code elements.
Process text to identify and render links.
For remaining text without special formatting, process for bold and italic formatting.
Return processed elements as a React node.
Identify and process bold text formatting.
Return text with bold formatting applied if found.
Return unformatted text if no bold formatting is detected.
Display a loading spinner if the component is in loading state.
Display a message indicating no content is available if content is empty.
Render the document content in a scrollable container with optional title bar.
Apply appropriate styling and layout for the document viewer.
Pass the markdown content to the renderMarkdown function for processing.
